## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in `wp-kwtsms.php` and `readme.txt` (if releasing)
- [ ] Changelog entry added to `readme.txt`
- [ ] PHPCS passes: `composer phpcs`
- [ ] PHPStan passes: `composer phpstan`
- [ ] PHPUnit passes: `composer test`
- [ ] Tested manually in WP Playground or live site
